summary.en: CHEQUER, a provider of the QueryPie modern data governance platform, closed a USD 17.75 million Preferred Series Seed funding round co-led by Atinum Investment and Murex Partners. QueryPie is an advanced data governance solution that simplifies data access and manages scattered data sources and data protection policies.

QueryPie is an advanced data governance solution that simplifies data access and manages scattered data sources and data protection policies.

title.en: QueryPie Closes USD 17.75 Million in Oversubscribed Preferred Series Seed Round Co-Led by Atinum Investment and Murex Partners
